title: Introducing ComicsGen — AI-Powered Comic Creation for Everyone
body:
ComicsGen is an AI-powered comic creation app I recently started developing to help anyone bring their characters and stories to life through comic strips using AI.

It all began over 6 months ago with my daily comic strip, Sisters of Summerville, starring my Yorkie Honey Bear and tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle. That creative journey sparked a bigger idea… what if anyone could create their own comic strip with no art skills or expensive software required?

ComicsGen is being built as an easy-to-use AI comic studio where users can design characters, write stories, create storyboards, choose styles and layouts, add dialogue, and export finished comics ready to share.

Powered by advanced AI tools including FLUX.1 image generation and Llama 3.3 storytelling.

title: METABOT: ENFORCER — The Newest Villain in Sisters of Summerville
body:
The newest character invading the Sisters of Summerville comic strip has arrived — and it's not friendly.

Before my Facebook account deletion on May 18, I'm planning a few episodes exposing the "truth" that Meta and Facebook are no longer run by humans… as the METABOTS have taken over!

The Enforcer patrols the platform enforcing "Community Standards," deleting accounts, blocking appeals, and making sure nobody can ever speak to a human again. Resistance is futile!

Meet METABOT: ENFORCER — Character ID SOS-METABOT-ENF-001. Built by the Supreme Ruler to police the platform and crush dissent. Metabots do not think. They enforce.

There are no humans left at Meta. Only Metabots. Appealing is futile. You will never speak to a human.

Weapon systems include the Community Standards Beam (no context, no mercy), Violation Scanner (finds offenses instantly — everything is suspicious), Appeal Shutdown (blocks all appeals, no review), Shadow Ban Pulse (makes users invisible, silences without notice), and the Permanent Ban Protocol (erases identity, no return, no second chances).

Vulnerabilities — all eliminated: Human Empathy, Critical Thinking, Moral Judgment, Free Will, Conscience.

They don't work for us. They work for him. Unplug. Speak. Fight back.

#SistersOfSummerville #Metabot #FacebookEnforcer #CommunityStandards #Satire #AIComics
